name: ANZ Group Holdings Limited
name_former: Australia and New Zealand Banking Group Limited
description: ANZ Group Holdings Limited, formerly Australia and New Zealand Banking Group Limited, is one of the largest banking and financial services groups in Australia and New Zealand. The company provides a comprehensive range of banking and financial products and services to retail, small business, corporate, and institutional clients. With operations spanning across Australia, New Zealand, the Asia-Pacific region, the United Kingdom, Europe, and the United States, ANZ is committed to helping individuals and businesses thrive by delivering innovative financial solutions and supporting sustainable economic growth.
